evals.prompt: amazon.co.jp で ガーデンテーブルセット を探す、条件：star >= 4.2、table の重さは 12kg 以上、椅子の重さが 7kg 以上、日本語のレビューが存在する、合計の値段が 10 万以下。該当する商品のurl を教えて、５つ見つけたら終わり。
evals.expected_output: MUST include (top pick): Yamazen KPT-1470 5pc (B09T97Z57Y) — this is the strongest match with 16.74kg table, 7.64kg chair, 5.0★, ¥74,999. Other verified matches that SHOULD appear: YAMAZEN Mosaic HMTS-50 (B00F2C31Q6, T:14kg C:7kg), Yamazen BBQ MFT-225BBQ (B0DP1WMPLZ, T:19.5kg C:8kg). Exact list of 5 may vary but the top recommendation should be stable. All results must be cached in SQLite.

assertions.description: Top pick Yamazen KPT-1470 must be present

evals.prompt: 条件を緩和：テーブル>=10kg、椅子>=6kg にしたら、全部の候補は？木材は杉材NG（耐久性が悪い）。材料の耐久性もチェックして。
evals.expected_output: MUST re-query existing SQLite DB first (NOT re-search Amazon). MUST include new addition: Yamazen KPT-7070 3pc (B09T8VZNQ9, T:10.41kg) which now qualifies under relaxed table weight. MUST exclude any cedar/杉材 products. Should include material durability notes. Exact total may vary but KPT-7070 appearing as a new entry is the key validation.

assertions.description: KPT-7070 must appear as newly qualifying product
Should query existing SQLite cache, not re-search Amazon from scratch

evals.prompt: amazon.co.jp でレジャーシートを探す。厚手か硬めで、芝生の凸凹があっても痛くない素材。評価4.2以上、日本語レビューあり、3-4人用サイズ、予算5000円以上OK。10個候補を出して。
evals.expected_output: MUST include (top pick for thickness): KEMITAC 6.5mm 5-layer (B0DFZ3KKN3) — thickest available product meeting criteria. Other strong matches: Viaggio+ 5mm (B0FF4BTJ7R), Hankins 4-layer (B0BLN7BYY6). Exact list of 10 may vary but should be grouped/sorted by thickness or cushioning level. All cached in SQLite.

assertions.description: KEMITAC 6.5mm must be present as thickest option
